Notice Of Motion To Stay

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Stay.

The unopposed motion to stay this case pending resolution of the federal vaccine cases is granted.

Order is signed.
